title: Third Impact
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Third Impact             Quote Post by Kevin » Sat Feb 23, 2013 4:13 pm So I finally saw Evangelion 3.0 and noticed one Thing: When Kaworu talks to Shinji about what happened, he is saying "Near Third Impact" but at the end of the Movie, when both of them are diving into Central-Dogma, Kaworu is saying: "The epicenter of Third Impact" So is there a difference between "Near Third Impact" and "Third Impact"? Not just, that from the look of 2.22 when Shinji goes into Awakening-Mode that had nothing to do with Central-Dogma and wasnt even near it. So I wonder with the decapitated Lillith, the destroyed Unit 06 and other Stuff like that, if there was another Impact in those 14 Years. What do you mean?

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sat Feb 23, 2013 7:31 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13796/SPOILERS-Geofront-Moon-Stuff/0/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13461/SPOILERS-Impact-Mechanics/0/

[]:             Quote Post by Kevin » Sun Feb 24, 2013 9:05 am Yeah that are some really interesting threads, but unfortunately they have nothing to do with my question. But thanks for the advice, I really did enjoy reading them.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Feb 24, 2013 9:17 am The difference between near-3I and 3I is that the Lilim(humans) call it Near, because it was aborted. But Kaworu for some reason still calls it 3I. We don't know why he says that.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Feb 24, 2013 9:27 pm ...to abreviate?

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Feb 24, 2013 10:06 pm ^ Yeah, pretty much just for brevity's sake, haha.

[]:             Quote Post by palerider1911 » Sun Feb 24, 2013 10:30 pm Kendrix wrote: ...to abreviate?

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Mon Feb 25, 2013 10:56 pm palerider1911 wrote: But how does that explain Kaworu calling Lilith's chamber the "epicenter" of 3I?

[]:             Quote Post by palerider1911 » Tue Feb 26, 2013 2:46 am K40s wrote: The word epicentre has to do with earthquakes and such, isn't the epicentre where the quake originates below earth's surface? Maybe he was referring to what I theorized in the "Geofront and Moon stuff" thread that the chamber where Lilith is, is part of the screw thing that surfaced during 4I and that for some reason the impacts make the screw levitate, in that case it would be fair to call it the epicentre of the impact...

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Feb 26, 2013 9:18 am palerider1911 wrote: But...I guess we'll have to wait and see. We don't yet know just what went down in Lilith's chamber, and whether it is related to Near 3I/3I, or was where *actual* 3I happened.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Feb 26, 2013 9:55 am TheFriskyIan wrote: Whatever happened down there not only happened during the 14 years, but also during the original 3.0 script since in the 2.0 preview it says Mark 06 descends into Dogma, and in 3.0 it's just kind of lying there until Unit 13 arrives. Meaning Kaworu could have saw what happened to Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Kevin » Tue Feb 26, 2013 5:32 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Whatever happened down there not only happened during the 14 years, but also during the original 3.0 script since in the 2.0 preview it says Mark 06 descends into Dogma, and in 3.0 it's just kind of lying there until Unit 13 arrives. Meaning Kaworu could have saw what happened to Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Tue Feb 26, 2013 6:02 pm I too thought of that: what if FINAL will be part finale, part flashback to what happened between 2.0 and 3.0?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Feb 26, 2013 7:47 pm amitakartok wrote: I too thought of that: what if FINAL will be part finale, part flashback to what happened between 2.0 and 3.0?

[]:             Quote Post by palerider1911 » Sat Mar 02, 2013 2:00 am TheFriskyIan wrote: Whatever happened down there not only happened during the 14 years, but also during the original 3.0 script since in the 2.0 preview it says Mark 06 descends into Dogma, and in 3.0 it's just kind of lying there until Unit 13 arrives. Meaning Kaworu could have saw what happened to Lilith.
